ddls:
CREATE TABLE "knowledge_areas" (
  "ka_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge area */,
  "ka_name" TEXT /* Name of the knowledge area */,
  "ka_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the knowledge area */,
  "ka_status" TEXT /* Status of the knowledge area (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ka_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "hd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "ka_code" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the knowledge areas table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "extension_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of extension activities for the knowledge area in the given year */,
  "research_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of research activities for the knowledge area in the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "ur_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ur_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "ur_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extension_activities" (
  "ea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extension activity */,
  "ka_code" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the knowledge areas table */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the extension activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the extension activity */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the extension activity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the extension activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_activities" (
  "ra_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research activity */,
  "ka_code" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the knowledge areas table */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ra_id")
)
